crore.title: Your Path to ₹1 Crore
crore.subtitle: Most families can get there. Find out exactly how.

state1.headline: Fund your child's dream college. We'll show you the exact math.
state1.subline: Whether it's NIT Rourkela, SCB Medical, or an IIT — we give you a transparent, month-by-month SIP roadmap to guarantee their education is fully funded. Start planning today with just ₹2,000/month.

state2.headline:
Start with ₹500.
That's it.
state2.subline: Less than a movie ticket for two. Less than a kilo of ghee. More than enough to start building your family's future.

state3.headline: We know what happened with chit funds.
state3.subline: Rose Valley. Saradha. We remember. Which is why InvestSahi is built on one principle: your money never touches our hands. It goes straight to government-regulated funds. You can verify your balance directly with the fund house, any time, without us.

landing.headline1: Most people wait until they're "rich enough" to start investing.
landing.headline2: InvestSahi was built right here in Odisha to prove them wrong.
landing.body: Whether you're a teacher in Kendrapara funding your daughter's IIT dream, or an HR Manager in Bhubaneswar planning an early retirement — we give you the transparent, SEBI-compliant roadmap to get there. Start with as little as ₹500 a month.

card.title: ₹2,500/month SIP
card.subtitle: With 10% annual step-up
card.disclaimer: ₹2,500/month starting SIP, 10% step-up yearly, 12% annual return. Not guaranteed.
card.footer: Start with a SIP as low as ₹500. Step up yearly. Build ₹1 crore.

stats.label1: to start — no minimum beyond this
stats.label2: is all it takes to build real wealth

stories.subtitle: Stories of real families in Odisha — and the financial decisions that changed everything.
stories.preview1: Mamata saved ₹2,000 every month in her bank account for 5 years. See what she missed — and what she's doing differently now.
stories.preview2: Rabi thought investing was only for salaried people. He earns ₹18,000 a month. Here's what he started with ₹500.
stories.preview3: Sushanta sent money home every month. He had no life insurance. This is the conversation his family wishes they'd had.

odia.headline: Odisha's Homegrown Financial Platform
odia.body: Financial advice shouldn't feel like it's imported from Wall Street. InvestSahi is built right here in Bhubaneswar. We understand the specific goals, careers, and financial needs of families in Odisha, which is why our entire platform is available in both English and Odia.
odia.bodyOdia: ଆର୍ଥିକ ପରାମର୍ଶ Wall Street ରୁ ଆମଦାନି ହୋଇଥିବା ଭଳି ଲାଗିବା ଉଚିତ ନୁହେଁ। InvestSahi ଭୁବନେଶ୍ୱରରେ ନିର୍ମିତ। ଆମେ Odia ପରିବାରର ନିର୍ଦ୍ଦିଷ୍ଟ ଲକ୍ଷ୍ୟ, କ୍ୟାରିୟର ଓ ଆର୍ଥିକ ଆବଶ୍ୟକତା ବୁଝୁ, ଏଥିପାଇଁ ଆମର ସମ୍ପୂର୍ଣ୍ଣ ପ୍ଲାଟଫର୍ମ ଇଂରାଜୀ ଓ ଓଡ଼ିଆ ଉଭୟରେ ଉପଲବ୍ଧ।

hero.headline: Every service your family needs
hero.subline: From your first SIP to your family's complete financial plan — we guide you through it all.

health.name: Health Insurance
health.desc: One hospital visit shouldn't ruin you

gold.name: Gold / Digital Gold Investment
gold.desc: Gold investment without physical storage hassles

fd.name: Fixed Deposits
fd.desc: Which FD, which bank, what tenure

investInsurance.name: Investment Insurance
investInsurance.desc: Insurance + market-linked investment in one plan

sip.name: SIP / Mutual Funds
sip.desc: Start a SIP with as little as ₹500/month. We help you pick the right funds based on your goals — child's education, emergency fund, or long-term wealth.
sip.who: Any family wanting to grow savings beyond a bank account
sip.benefit: Potential 12-15% long-term returns with complete liquidity

term.name: Term Life Insurance
term.desc: Pure protection for your family. If something happens to you, your family gets ₹50 lakh or more — for a premium as low as ₹500/month.
term.who: Anyone with dependents — spouse, children, or parents
term.benefit: ₹50 lakh cover for under ₹600/month for a 30-year-old

health.name: Health Insurance
health.desc: One hospital visit can cost ₹2-5 lakh. Health insurance ensures your savings stay protected when medical emergencies strike.
health.who: Every family — especially those without employer coverage

sukanya.name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
sukanya.desc: Government-backed savings scheme exclusively for your daughter's future. Currently offers ~8% interest with tax benefits under 80C.
sukanya.who: Parents of girls below 10 years of age
sukanya.benefit: 8%+ guaranteed returns with full tax exemption

ppf.name: Public Provident Fund (PPF)
ppf.desc: 15-year government-guaranteed savings with tax-free returns. One of the safest long-term investments available in India.
ppf.who: Conservative savers looking for guaranteed, tax-free returns

eduLoan.name: Education Loans
eduLoan.desc: Planning for NIT, AIIMS, IIT, or private colleges? We help you find the right education loan with the best terms and interest rates.
eduLoan.who: Parents planning for higher education in India or abroad
eduLoan.benefit: Tax deduction on interest under Section 80E

nps.name: National Pension System (NPS)
nps.desc: Build a retirement corpus with additional ₹50,000 tax deduction under 80CCD(1B) — over and above the ₹1.5 lakh limit of 80C.
nps.benefit: Extra ₹50,000 tax deduction plus market-linked growth

atal.name: Atal Pension Yojana
atal.desc: Guaranteed monthly pension of ₹1,000-5,000 after age 60. Designed for workers in the unorganised sector.
atal.who: Informal workers, small business owners, daily wage earners

rd.name: Recurring Deposits
rd.desc: Fixed monthly savings with guaranteed returns. Ideal as a first step for people new to disciplined saving.
rd.who: First-time savers wanting zero-risk, fixed returns
rd.benefit: Guaranteed returns with flexible tenures from 6 months

fd.name: Fixed Deposits
fd.desc: We help you compare FD rates across banks and NBFCs to find the best returns for your tenure and amount.
fd.who: Anyone with a lump sum looking for safe, guaranteed returns
fd.benefit: Up to 9%+ with select NBFCs and senior citizen benefits

sgb.name: Gold / Digital Gold Investment
sgb.desc: Invest in gold without storage hassles. Options include government bonds, digital gold, and sovereign instruments.
sgb.who: Anyone who buys gold — this is smarter than jewellery or coins
sgb.benefit: Gold price appreciation with no storage risk

ulip.name: Investment Insurance
ulip.desc: Plans that combine life cover with market-linked investments. Best suited for long-term wealth creation with insurance protection.
ulip.who: Investors wanting insurance + investment in a single product
ulip.benefit: Tax-free maturity under 10(10D) with market-linked returns

mudra.name: MUDRA Loans
mudra.desc: Government-backed business loans up to ₹10 lakh under Shishu, Kishore, and Tarun categories. No collateral needed.
mudra.who: Small business owners, shopkeepers, and entrepreneurs in Odisha
mudra.benefit: Collateral-free loans up to ₹10 lakh at competitive rates

shop.name: Shop Insurance
shop.desc: Protect your shop or business premises against fire, theft, burglary, and natural disasters. Affordable annual premiums.
shop.who: Shop owners, small business premises, godown operators

accident.name: Personal Accident Cover
accident.desc: Covers accidental death and disability. Essential for business owners and workers with physical risk exposure.
accident.who: Business owners, field workers, delivery personnel

home.name: Home Insurance
home.desc: Protect your home structure and contents against fire, floods, earthquakes, and theft.
home.who: Homeowners wanting to protect their biggest asset
home.benefit: Comprehensive cover for structure and contents from ₹1,500/year

personal.name: Personal Loans
personal.desc: Quick personal loans for business expansion, emergencies, or bridging cash flow gaps. We help you find the best rates.
personal.who: Salaried or self-employed individuals needing quick funds

sidebar.ruleBody: Banks typically require 20% down payment. On a ₹60L flat, that's ₹12L upfront. Starting a SIP today means you arrive at the bank with cash — not scrambling for a personal loan.

sidebar.ruleDesc: If your corpus earns 12% and inflation runs at 6%, you can safely withdraw 4–6% per year forever. This is why we target 25× your annual expenses.
sidebar.npsDesc: If you're a government employee or salaried professional, NPS gives an extra ₹50,000 tax deduction under 80CCD(1B) — on top of the standard 80C limit. Most people miss this.
sidebar.chatDesc: In English or Odia. No jargon.
